author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Also observed: 'claude.ai Open Targets' (https://mcp.platform.opentargets.org/mcp) times out on plain curl — DNS resolves but TCP/HTTPS hangs. Upstream outage, not a local config issue; nothing to fix on our end. Notion and Cloudflare show 'Needs authentication' — expected, just means the OAuth flow hasn't been run.
